title: canarium balsamiferum
intro: Canarium balsamiferum, also known as the Malabar thalamus or Indian walnut, is a plant species belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various folk medicines due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Canarium balsamiferum include its potential in treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Canarium balsamiferum is often prepared in herbal remedies such as tinctures, decoctions, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
